ariaSpec.usage: Indicates the canvas role as an image. Applicable when an image is loaded.
Provides an accessible name for the canvas by describing the image content. Applicable when an image is loaded.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses next focusable element (the ToolBar or an input/button on the Edit pane).
Undo the last modification performed on the image.
Redo a modification performed on the image.
